overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a walk through a rainy, makeshift urban shantytown. The player moves through an industrial outdoor area with makeshift shelters, graffiti-covered structures, and NPCs with cybernetic implants and distinctive fashion. The atmosphere is gritty and dystopian with wet concrete, industrial scaffolding, and scattered furniture.

Row of bright yellow concrete dividers lining the left side of the walkway
Tall industrial fencing running parallel to the barriers
Massive industrial tank with green graffiti markings visible in the distance
Tall dystopian skyscrapers and industrial structures visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a green tarp shelter in a makeshift camp, then transitions into a rainy industrial walkway lined with yellow concrete barriers. The camera moves forward past metal fencing toward an open plaza area, with a large cylindrical tank structure becoming visible on the right side.

entered.detail: Scattered white plastic tables and red-padded chairs arranged in informal seating groups
Yellow metal scaffolding and industrial framework surrounding the plaza
Circular table emitting bright green light with graffiti on its base

segments.scene_description: Moving through an open plaza dominated by a large cylindrical tank with green graffiti on the right. The area features scattered plastic outdoor furniture where NPCs sit and socialize. The camera passes tattooed characters and approaches a distinctive green glowing table in the center of the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with glowing table and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking past the green glowing table and continuing through the seating area toward the back of the plaza

notable_agents.action: NPC climbing a yellow metal ladder attached to the scaffolding structure

entered.detail: Bright yellow metal ladder attached to industrial scaffolding
Weathered concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the green glowing table which shifts to the left side of the frame. A yellow metal ladder becomes prominent on the right with an NPC climbing it. The scene continues through the outdoor seating area with industrial scaffolding and graffiti-covered walls becoming more visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear plaza with graffiti wall and food stall

notable_agents.action: NPC with bright green hair sitting on the wet ground near the graffiti wall

entered.detail: Large concrete wall with prominent 'BROKEN' graffiti and colorful mural art
Mobile food vendor cart with red and white coloring and vendor standing behind it
Thick black industrial cables snaking across the wet concrete ground
Metal staircase leading up to an elevated platform or building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a prominent wall with 'BROKEN' graffiti where several NPCs are gathered, including one with green hair sitting on the ground. Industrial cables cover the wet ground in this rear section of the plaza. A food stall cart becomes visible in the background as the camera moves toward the final bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor bar with green stools and serving counter

agents.ego_description: walking into the bar area and approaching the counter where NPCs are gathered drinking

entered.detail: Long serving counter with bright green bar stools and NPCs gathered drinking
Large industrial HVAC units and ventilation systems attached to buildings
Metal storage racks and shelving containing various items

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a semi-covered bar area with a prominent counter lined with bright green stools. NPCs gather here drinking and socializing, while industrial ventilation units and metal shelving dominate the background. The food stall remains visible in the distance to the left as the camera approaches the bar counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered makeshift camp into a bustling, rain-slicked industrial plaza and its accompanying bar area. It begins under a green tarp shelter before moving onto a rainy walkway lined with yellow concrete barriers and metal fencing. As the camera enters an open plaza, the view expands to reveal a large cylindrical tank with green graffiti and NPCs socializing around scattered plastic furniture, eventually centering on a glowing green table. The scene then shifts past a yellow metal ladder and industrial scaffolding toward a wall marked with BROKEN graffiti, where cables crisscross the wet ground near a distant food stall. Finally, the movement leads into a semi-covered bar area, passing the food stall to approach a counter lined with bright green stools and surrounded by industrial ventilation units.
